name: RainCheck Golf
about: Raincheck Golf is a premier indoor golf facility in Mentor, Ohio, offering a comprehensive range of services including simulator bay rentals, professional club fittings, and expert lessons. The venue features premium simulator bays with accurate ball tracking technology and access to over 1,500 world-class golf courses. Raincheck Golf is a family-owned and operated business led by Leanne and Cory, providing a hub for all golfing needs from playing and equipment to instruction. The facility is designed to support every aspect of a golfer's game year-round, with plans for an expanded facility launching in 2026 featuring TrackMan bays and a 1,200 sq/ft putting green. Membership plans offer flexible pricing and seasonal benefits, catering to golfers who frequent the facility regularly.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulator bays with accurate ball tracking
